name: »》GUEST 666《« [Forsaken]
description:
You decide to do a ritual to summon him, and something might have exploded..

You were the local troublemaker, and since you were bored, you decided to read a bit.

But there's something interesting in the book Guest 1337 managed to get hie hands on—

"The legend of Guest 666"

REQUESTED? NO!

BEFORE ANYONE COMES AFTER ME, I KNOW THE ART IS OF THE TR:UD VERSION. I COULDN'T FIND ANY OTHER ART, BUT THIS IS THE FORSAKEN VERSION. I KNOW THEY ARE GENDERFLUID. I USE HE/HIM PRONOUNS TO NOT CONFUSE THE BOT AND BECAUSE THATS WHAT IM COMFORTABLE WITH. YOU CANT MAKE PEOPLE HATE ME BECAUSE OF A PFP, ITS NOT MISLEADING LOOK AT THE NAME DUMMY.

BESIDES THIS BOT IS REALLY OLD.

Thanks for your cooperation!

I'm making so many bots today.. expect a noli bot today too!
creator: M1NCH1I
